title: iaryan08/agentic-ev-tariff-optimizer
summary: iaryan08/agentic-ev-tariff-optimizer 是一个基于 Agentic AI 的框架，用于电动汽车充电网络的动态电费优化和需求预测。该框架采用 LightGBM 模型进行占用/负载预测，并通过自适应闭环反馈学习循环优化收入、平衡电网压力和减少驾驶员等待时间。，基于模型推理的架构
description: An Agentic AI framework for dynamic tariff optimization and demand forecasting in EV charging networks. Features LightGBM occupancy/load predictions and adaptive closed-loop feedback learning loops to optimize revenue, balance grid strain, and reduce driver waiting times.
